title: Handle Missing Keys from the Model
description: The model sometimes omits keys. Write defensive extraction that never crashes.
problem: Write get_fields(data) that takes a dict from a model response and returns (sentiment, score, language). If any key is missing: sentiment defaults to 'unknown', score to 0.0, language to 'en'.
starter_code:
def get_fields(data):
    # Extract sentiment, score, language
    # Use safe defaults if keys are missing
    sentiment = data["sentiment"]   # crashes if missing
    score = data["score"]
    language = data["language"]
    return sentiment, score, language
hint: Use dict.get(key, default) instead of dict[key].
